messages.content: paraphrase this: Please tell us who is your line manager?
Could you inform us of the name of your direct supervisor?
paraphrase this: We'll reopen this ticket and we'll assist on how to delete old emails in Archive to free-up some space,
We will reactivate this ticket and provide support on deleting old emails from the Archive to create additional space.
paraphrase this: Monitor been provided temporarily.
A monitor has been supplied on a temporary basis.
paraphrase this: As per IT policy, laptop must have obly Drive C in order for files to synced in OneDrive. For installation and uninstallation, please raise ticket so we can assist you.

In accordance with IT policy, the laptop should only contain Drive C to ensure files can be synchronized with OneDrive. For installing or uninstalling software, please submit a ticket so we can offer assistance.
paraphrase this: As the PR has been signed, we'd like to ask if we can purchase AutoCAD thru petty cash?
Now that the PR is signed, we would like to inquire if it's possible to buy AutoCAD using petty cash?
paraphrase this: Could you please verify the the status of Andres' employment?
Could you please confirm Andres' current employment status?
paraphrase this: Monitor has been returned to Milestone office that monitor has been used by Khalid Moukrim.
The monitor, previously used by Khalid Moukrim, has been returned to the Milestone office.

paraphrase this: As we have given the phone to Nouf used by Moukrim, please create separate ticket for providing phone to either Robert or Ahmed Salman al-Qahtani so that name will appear on display on phone.

Since we've allocated the phone previously utilized by Moukrim to Nouf, kindly initiate a new ticket for assigning a phone to either Robert or Ahmed Salman al-Qahtani, ensuring their name is displayed on the phone.
paraphrase this: Please fill-out these so that we know to whom we given the monitor.
Please complete these details so we can track to whom the monitor was provided.
paraphrase this: As the PR has been signed, kindly update us if PO on ERP has been created?
Now that the PR is signed, could you please inform us whether a PO has been generated in the ERP system?
paraphrase this: Kindly send us screenshot of error if you click the link?
Please provide us with a screenshot of the error should you encounter any when clicking the link.
paraphrase this: You may reply what's on your mind.
Feel free to share your thoughts in response.
